admission_schema: per-bank 'admission': {pass, witness_multiplicities {atom_id:n_a} sum=972, dose_dev, peak_ok, budget_ok, nonmixable}; atom_id = row index into npz rows array

admission.note: witness = the 972-row design itself (each atom multiplicity 1); atom_id = row index into rows

guards.representation: mixable design measure; atoms=972 design rows, uniform weights; per-atom amplitudes are frozen nominal powers

L0.note: Frozen deployed SCAT32 (k=32). Per-atom amplitudes = ridge power schedule. Witness = the frozen design.
L0.role: KNOB / rank-one default; simplex tie-break corner e_0; MIXTURE_MATERIALIZATION_FAIL fallback (R27 2)

admission.note: witness = the 972-row design itself (each atom multiplicity 1); atom_id = row index into rows

guards.representation: mixable design measure; atoms=972 design rows, uniform weights; per-atom amplitudes are frozen nominal powers

L1.note: R27 rebuild: scattered-32 (sparsek k=32, seed 630032) replacing scattered-16; greedy-drop + Sinkhorn (nominal power schedule).

L2.note: R27 rebuild: PAIRED super-atom = two disjoint 4x4 blocks (|supp|=32), small-cluster motif, distinct from L3.

L7.note: Offline support-expanding FW (dev_gap_probe.primal_probe, full safety cone) re-solved over the k_eff>=32 dictionary ['bar16pairH', 'bar16pairV', 'compact16pair', 'rect4x8', 'rect8x4', 'ring16pair', 'scat32', 'sq32c'] on the SIX m1_dev (632900) prototype prescan estimates (nu=2000,b=0.60). Prototypes ONLY (leakage firewall). All FW mass at level 0. The FW per-FAMILY mass fractions set the bank's geometry mix (quotas); per-family coverage-aware greedy-drop + combined Sinkhorn (nominal powers) gives a coverage-complete, witness-feasible 972-row design. Witness = the design.

library: RLMI/RGLI 8-bank k_eff>=32 library (mixable measures + exact-972 admission witnesses)
representation: each L_k = 972-row k=32 design; mixable measure = atoms (the rows) + uniform weights; per-atom amplitudes are the frozen NOMINAL POWERS (ridge schedule, L0 precedent); the exact-972 admission witness is the design itself, in-band under nominal powers before any gamma[0.94,1.06] trim.
